ddls:
CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the instrument */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest for the instrument */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the instrument */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend amount paid on the date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio if a stock split occurred */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument (e.g., stock, bond, ETF) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market where the instrument is traded */,
  "isin" TEXT /* ISIN (International Securities Identification Number) */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* CUSIP (Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the financial instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the financial instrument */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date the instrument information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "initial_investment" REAL /* Initial amount invested in the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the portfolio */,
  "return_percentage" REAL /* Return percentage of the portfolio */,
  "strategy" TEXT /* Investment strategy used for the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the position belongs to */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument in the position */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument held */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of the instrument */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the position was entered */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the instrument in the position */,
  "unrealized_profit_loss" REAL /* Unrealized profit or loss for the position */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in the position value */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date the position information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_positions_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_positions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "status_message" TEXT /* Detailed status message for the trade */,
  "closed_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was closed (if applicable) */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss from the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the watchlist was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the watchlist (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watchlist */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist item */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist the item belongs to */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument in the watchlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the item was added to the watchlist */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the watchlist item */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date the watchlist item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_items_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_items_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data source */,
  "last_fetch" TEXT /* Date the data was last fetched from the source */,
  "fetch_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which data is fetched from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_fetch_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fetch log */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument fetched */,
  "fetch_date" TEXT /* Date the data was fetched */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the fetch operation (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the fetch failed */,
  "fetch_duration" REAL /* Duration of the fetch operation */,
  "data_fetched" INTEGER /* Number of records fetched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_fetch_logs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_fetch_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "trigger_value" REAL /* Value that triggers the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, disabled) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "last_trigger_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was last triggered */,
  "trigger_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the alert has been triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert history record */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that was triggered */,
  "triggered_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "triggered_value" REAL /* Value that triggered the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., triggered, dismissed) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_history_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., market overview, performance review) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users the report is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
